# Junior Workflow Settings
# Generated by j-setup on 2026-05-22
# Run j-setup again to modify

## Project
@project-name: claude-code-chat
@project-type: fullstack
@language: typescript

## Branches
@main-branch: main
@dev-branch:
@merge-strategy: direct

## Folders
@code: .
@backend: apps/api/
@frontend: apps/web/
@tasks: tasks/
@docs: docs/
@tools: tools/

## Commands
@test-backend: bun run --filter @claude-code-chat/api test
@test-frontend: cd apps/web && ./node_modules/.bin/ng test
@build: bun run --filter @claude-code-chat/api build && cd apps/web && ./node_modules/.bin/ng build
@start-backend: bun run api:dev
@start-frontend: bun run web:dev
@migrations-add: cd apps/api && bun run db:generate
@migrations-apply: cd apps/api && bun run db:migrate

## Ports
@frontend-port: 4200
@backend-port: 3000
@broker-port: 4000
@db-port: 5432

## Deploy
@deploy-script: none
@deploy-docs: none
@domain: none
@backup-script: none
@restore-script: none

## Auth
@auth-method: google-oauth
@auth-notes: Better Auth with Google OAuth + JWT

## Database
@db-type: postgresql
@db-local: docker

## Methodology
@backend-method: tddab
@frontend-method: manual
@tddab-file: .claude/commands/mind-sets/tddab-planner.md

## C# mindset version
@csharp-mindset: n/a

## Testing
@test-e2e: tests/e2e/
@health-endpoint: /health
@chromedevtools: no

## Local Limitations
@limitations: none
